codeReview.summary: The original docs refresh failed because README was reduced to a title and disclaimer, but the follow-up fixes repaired that gap and the final repo state now satisfies the web-only docs refresh intent. README truthfully documents the current web app, setup flow, env guidance, port 3005 workflow, and shipped-vs-backlog separation; ROADMAP and CLAUDE remain aligned with that scope; and the cleanup commit removes the remaining duplicated env guidance and misleading helper-script behavior.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the original failed docs refresh, the README repair commit, and the final workflow-truthfulness cleanup commit. The prior failure is adequately addressed: README is restored with truthful web-only product/setup content, the markdown corpus stays aligned with ROADMAP and CLAUDE, and the final truth sources/helpers now match the committed 3005 pnpm workflow.
